title: MindForge Project Configuration Schema
description: JSON Schema for MINDFORGE.md key-value settings

MINDFORGE_VERSION_REQUIRED.description: Minimum MindForge version required for this config

PLANNER_MODEL.description: Claude model to use for the planning agent

EXECUTOR_MODEL.description: Claude model to use for execution agents

REVIEWER_MODEL.description: Claude model to use for the code reviewer

SECURITY_MODEL.description: Claude model to use for security review (recommend Opus for thoroughness)

TIER1_AUTO_APPROVE.description: Auto-approve Tier 1 changes without user confirmation

WAVE_CONFIRMATION_REQUIRED.description: Require user confirmation before each execution wave

AUTO_DISCUSS_PHASE.description: Automatically run discuss-phase before every plan-phase

VERIFY_PASS_RATE_WARNING_THRESHOLD.description: Warn when first-attempt verify pass rate drops below this

COMPACTION_THRESHOLD_PCT.description: Context window percentage that triggers compaction

MAX_TASKS_PER_PHASE.description: Suggest phase split when task count exceeds this

MAX_FUNCTION_LINES.description: Maximum allowed function length in lines

MAX_CYCLOMATIC_COMPLEXITY.description: Maximum allowed cyclomatic complexity per function

BLOCK_ON_MEDIUM_SECURITY_FINDINGS.description: Block PR creation on MEDIUM security findings (default: only HIGH+)

ALWAYS_LOAD_SKILLS.description: Comma-separated list of skills to always load regardless of triggers

DISABLED_SKILLS.description: Comma-separated list of skills to never load

MAX_FULL_SKILL_INJECTIONS.description: Maximum number of skills to inject in full (rest are summarised)

BRANCHING_STRATEGY.description: Git branching strategy for MindForge phases

NOTIFY_ON.description: Comma-separated events that trigger Slack notifications

DISCUSS_PHASE_REQUIRED_ABOVE_DIFFICULTY.description: Require discuss-phase when difficulty score exceeds this value

AI_REVIEW_DAILY_LIMIT.description: Maximum AI PR reviews per day (0 = unlimited)

CI_AUTO_APPROVE_TIER2.description: Auto-approve Tier 2 changes in CI mode

CI_SECURITY_SCAN.description: Run security scan in CI mode

CI_MIN_COVERAGE_PCT.description: Minimum test coverage in CI (may differ from interactive threshold)

CI_OUTPUT_FORMAT.description: Output format for CI execution logs

SECURITY_AUTOTRIGGER.description: NON-OVERRIDABLE: security auto-trigger for auth/payment/PII changes

PLAN_FIRST.description: NON-OVERRIDABLE: plan-first rule (no implementation without a PLAN)

AUDIT_WRITING.description: NON-OVERRIDABLE: AUDIT.jsonl writing for every significant action
